title: hypericum hircinum subsp. hircinum
intro: Hypericum hircinum subsp. hircinum, commonly known as wild marjoram, is a species of flowering plant in the family Hypericaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Hypericum hircinum subsp. hircinum include its ability to reduce stress, improve mood, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to promote overall well-being.
